# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 550. Collisions & Collision Reports
##### § 550.063 — Report on Appropriate Form

The form of all written collision reports must be approved by the department and the Department of Public Safety. A person who is required to file a written collision report shall report on the appropriate form and shall disclose all information required by the form unless the information is not available.

*Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 709 (H.B.2190), Sec. 55, eff. September 1, 2023.*
